title: PAU – Research Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: PAU Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Research Fellow. Candidates with B.Sc, M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through PAU official website pau.edu.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Agri/ B.Sc.Agri.(Hons)/ B.Sc. (Hons)Agri./ B.Sc. Biotech (Hons)/ B.Sc. Hort./ B.Sc. (Hons) Hort/ B.Sc. Forestry/ B.Sc. (Hons) Forestry with minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks. OR M.Sc. Agronomy/M.Sc. Soil Science/ M.Sc. Agricultural Meteorology with minimum OCPA 6.50/10.00 basis or 65% marks with NET may be recruited as Research Fellow. Ph.D. candidates are exempted from NET.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- fixed + 16% HRA p.m. or Rs. 25,000/- + 16% HRA (FIXED) per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: Punjab Agricultural University Research Fellow Recruitment 2026
